rationale: The citing paper’s Study 1a uses a head-mounted in-store video tracking design with 250 shoppers (237 usable), which closely mirrors the cited paper’s signature dataset/design (same 250 intercepted shoppers, 237 usable, wearable video + entry/exit surveys in grocery). Given this strong overlap in core method/context and the DOI-matched reference, the cited work is plausibly a key methodological/foundational source rather than an incidental mention.
